jsonLd.title: Vacancy for Teacher at upGrad
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Teacher looking for your next big career move? upGrad in Nagpur offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About upGrad:
upGrad is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Support students with special educational needs
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Content Creation

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Nagpur, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with upGrad!
